scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/plugin.ts --outdir dist --target bun && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --noEmit false && bun run copy:skills && bun scripts/install-plugin-shim.mjs
scripts.watch: rm -rf dist && bun run copy:skills && bun build src/plugin.ts --outdir dist --target bun --watch & tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --noEmit false --watch
